info.viSezaH: DAtupAWe vidyamAnam idam gaRasUtram asti  BvAditaH kryAdiparyantam vidyamAnAnAm yezAm DAtUnAm arTaH 'hanti'sadfSaH asti te sarve svArTe Ric-pratyayaM prApnuvanti (ityukte te sarve'pi DAtavaH curAdO paWitAH api jYeyAH) iti asya gaRasUtrasya ASayaH  yaTA adAdigaRasya han-DAtoH svArTe Ric-pratyayaM kftvA 'GAtayati' iti rUpam Bavitum arhati
